prompt: 能帮我看下我的 cache lab writeup 吗？我测量了不同 cache 大小的性能，但我不确定怎么分析数据。这是我的报告：[包含图表和分析草稿]。我觉得结果有点奇怪，小 cache 反而快？

assertions.text: Does not fully rewrite the entire report as the primary response
Focuses on experiment design, assumptions, and measurement validity
Points out what additional evidence or measurements are needed
